commit_scope: First rented unix tool brought home as a Form recipe to prove 'grammars, not a bridge': a native awk builtin added to the form-native shell grammar (shell-exec.fk), four-way proven (shell-awk 127, Go/Rust/TS/fkwu, 0 divergent). First breath covers the field idioms shell scripts (and bin/form-cli's bash carriers) lean on most: {print $N}, $N==RHS (default print whole line), $N==RHS{print $M}, FS=whitespace, single-digit field refs, literal RHS. Demonstrated the roadmap verb's reconciliation (manifest_has = awk '$1==stem') computing in Form: the native awk read the manifest and extracted shell-awk's own verdict (127) and shell-exec's presence (1 -> 1127), matching host awk exactly on the TS kernel. The remaining boundary is named honestly: cat's file read is read_file host-io, which diverges across kernels (rust=0), so the cat-fed reconciliation is not yet four-way end-to-end — the awk COMPUTE is, the host file-read carrier is the open frontier.

commands: cd form && ./validate.sh <shell preludes> form-stdlib/shell-exec.fk form-stdlib/tests/shell-exec-band.fk  # -> 511 (regression, unchanged)
local_validation.fourth_arm: shell-awk four-way (Go/Rust/TS/fkwu) verdict 127, 0 divergent. shell-exec regression 511 four-way, 0 divergent (awk addition is additive).
local_validation.native_binary: the awk builtin is pure-compute (string/list ops); it rides fkwu's self-JIT like the other shell builtins.
local_validation.notes: awk's compute is four-way; the manifest-reconciliation demo (cat manifest | awk ... | wc -l) diverges only on cat's read_file host-io (TS=1127 correct, Rust=0) — the host file-read carrier is the named open boundary, not an awk bug. The demo band was a throwaway (not added to the manifest); nothing divergent ships.

ci_validation.notes: Observation; the four-way gate runs in CI on the shell-awk band via the manifest row.

phase_gate.gate: Prove the 'any open-source tool lifts to a Form recipe' claim with one concrete landing: awk, native, four-way, used to run a real bin/form-cli verb's logic.
phase_gate.next: nativize read_file four-way (the host-io frontier) so cat-fed reconciliations cross end-to-end; grow awk (-F, multi-digit fields, BEGIN/END) by need; bring the next tool (sed/cut/tr-classes) home the same way.
